source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Please choose the SMILES expression of the transition-state structure shown in the image, ignoring the arrows. <image_1>
extraction_notes: 答案字段为选项字母“A”，已根据 options 映射为对应选项文本
记录中仅有 image_1 的内存对象描述“<PIL.Image mode=RGBA size=(310, 250)>”，未见可提取的图片路径或 URL

image_dependency: question_text explicitly asks for the SMILES of the transition-state structure shown in the image
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the key information is visual rather than textual
the task depends on reading a depicted chemical structure and ignoring arrows, which cannot be recovered from text alone
multi_step: solver must parse the visual chemical structure, then map it to one of 4 candidate SMILES strings
the instruction to ignore arrows adds an additional filtering step beyond simple lookup
multiple close chemistry options suggest comparison of substructures rather than a single direct recognition step
verifiability: choices are explicit and the provided answer exactly matches one listed option, enabling straightforward answer checking
answer_type=short_text with a single canonical-looking SMILES string is easy to compare deterministically
asset_registry_record shows registry_passed=true, image exists=true, and answer_present=true, supporting reliable downstream validation

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案和主图像均存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空
题目核心语义依赖图像中的化学过渡态结构，当前图像资产可用，支持恢复与判定
可验证性高：答案为明确的短文本 SMILES，且与候选选项可直接比对
虽存在视觉化学识别与 SMILES 等价形式风险，但不构成核心语义缺失，样本仍适合进入候选池
